Author: dajoey
Name: Dagobert - Price Matcher
Description: Fork of Dagobert — matches the lowest market board price instead of undercutting. Default amount is 0 (exact match). You can still set a negative amount to undercut if desired.
Punchline: Matches (instead of undercuts) market board prices
Changelog: Forked from Dagobert v1.10.0.0 — default match amount changed to 0 (exact price match)
